description: Aggregated rotation intelligence derived from manual backfill and automated watcher snapshots.

latest_observation.severity_reason: Moderate enode rotation detected: 0 added and 4 removed.

coverage_note: Manual backfill is a partial archive. Missing dates represent missed observation windows, not confirmed absence of changes.

provider_detection.confidence_note: Provider and ASN values are heuristic hints based on static IP prefix matching. Treat as enrichment, not final verified ASN truth.

dac_infrastructure_signal.source_reference: Derived from community observation evidence in Report 5: Official Enode Evolution Analysis — Infrastructure Rotation & Network Maturation, plus watcher observation history.
dac_infrastructure_signal.disclaimer: DAC Infrastructure Signal is a community inference layer based on observed registry history, peer identity strings, persistence, subnet patterns, and provider hints. It is not an official DAC classification and should not be treated as confirmed node ownership.

provider_hint.notes: Static prefix heuristic based on common Contabo ranges.

Moderate enode rotation detected: 0 added and 4 removed.

report_ready_summary.short_summary: Across 17 total observations, the DAC official enode list showed 28 unique enodes and 28 unique IPs. The observed target port remained within [28657]. Enode count ranged from 7 to 15, with an average of 12.12.
report_ready_summary.manual_to_automated_context: The dataset combines partial manual observations from the pre-watcher period with automated GitHub Actions snapshots after the watcher was deployed.
report_ready_summary.technical_value: This summary provides a structured basis for analyzing bootstrap peer rotation, persistent observed enodes, IP recurrence, provider hints, ASN hints, DAC Infrastructure Signals, and possible infrastructure maturation patterns.
